'''rarada''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:uhtsong|uhtsong]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-r-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uhtsong|uhtsong]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| rarada
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rærædæth|rærædæth]] || [[word:rærædæj|rærædæj]] || [[word:rærædæsh|rærædæsh]] || [[word:rærædæ|rærædæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rararadath|rararadath]] || [[word:rararadaj|rararadaj]] || [[word:rararadash|rararadash]] || [[word:rararada|rararada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:raradath|raradath]] || [[word:raradaj|raradaj]] || [[word:raradash|raradash]] || [[word:rarada|rarada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rarafdath|rarafdath]] || [[word:rarafdaj|rarafdaj]] || [[word:rarafdash|rarafdash]] || [[word:rarafdaf|rarafdaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:raradatha|raradatha]] || [[word:raradaja|raradaja]] || [[word:raradasha|raradasha]] || [[word:raradaka|raradaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:raradath|raradath]] || [[word:raradaj|raradaj]] || [[word:raradash|raradash]] || [[word:rarada|rarada]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:raradathal|raradathal]] || [[word:raradajal|raradajal]] || [[word:raradashal|raradashal]] || [[word:raradakal|raradakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:raradathatha|raradathatha]] || [[word:raradajaja|raradajaja]] || [[word:raradashasha|raradashasha]] || [[word:raradaka|raradaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:raradathan|raradathan]] || [[word:raradajan|raradajan]] || [[word:raradashan|raradashan]] || [[word:raradakan|raradakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:raradathaoro|raradathaoro]] || [[word:raradajaoro|raradajaoro]] || [[word:raradashaoro|raradashaoro]] || [[word:raradakaoro|raradakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
